description: Ensure devcontainer auth/config volumes are repaired after sandbox UID/GID remap so persisted credentials stay readable. Tracks GitHub issue #220.

userStories.title: Repair auth mount ownership after UID sync
userStories.description: As a sandbox operator on a host with a non-default checkout UID/GID, I want auth/config mounts repaired after UID reconciliation so persisted credentials remain readable by the sandbox user.
acceptanceCriteria: .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh centralizes auth/config mount ownership repair in an idempotent helper
The helper repairs compose auth/config mounts plus /home/sandbox/.hermes legacy home state and .ssh when present
The helper never recursively chowns the bind-mounted checkout or $HERMES_HOME when it points inside /home/sandbox/harness
The helper preserves non-recursive parent repairs for /home/sandbox/.local, /home/sandbox/.local/share, and /home/sandbox/.config
The helper chowns to the sandbox user's current numeric uid:gid and resolves that owner inside the helper on each invocation
The helper runs before and after host UID/GID reconciliation and logs each ownership repair pass
userStories.notes: Completed directly on 2026-06-16; entrypoint helper added with pre/post UID-sync repair and numeric owner chowns

userStories.title: Pin the UID-remap regression test
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want script-level regression coverage so future entrypoint edits cannot move auth-volume repair back before UID sync only.
acceptanceCriteria: A Vitest test asserts .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh computes numeric sandbox ownership from id -u sandbox and id -g sandbox inside the helper
A Vitest test asserts the repair helper is invoked before and after the host UID reconciliation block
userStories.notes: Completed directly on 2026-06-16; scripts/__tests__/entrypoint.test.ts covers numeric owner and ordering

userStories.title: Document the runtime invariant
userStories.description: As a future agent, I want the runtime invariant discoverable in the changelog/wiki so the repair ordering is not re-derived during later boot-path work.
acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md records the fix under Unreleased Fixed with issue #220

wiki/sandbox-auth-volumes.md explains the auth volume ownership invariant with schema-valid frontmatter, sources, relevant source files, line-cited claims, system relationships, symptoms, verification, and recovery guidance
wiki/README.md is refreshed so the new wiki entry is indexed
userStories.notes: Completed directly on 2026-06-16; wiki entry/raw snapshot/index and changelog updated
